final_scene_table.caption_text: 用資訊技術，把想法變成可以實作的作品。
final_scene_table.editing_note: Use fast opening B-roll and avoid private screen content.

final_scene_table.caption_text: 國立臺南大學資訊工程學系，培養理解問題、設計系統與實作應用的人才。
final_scene_table.editing_note: Use text title and campus/classroom footage.

final_scene_table.caption_text: 從程式設計、人工智慧、資料處理到系統與網路，學習不只停在概念，也落實在動手實作。
final_scene_table.editing_note: Use safe demo screens and hands-on learning footage.

final_scene_table.caption_text: 在專題與團隊合作中，學生練習溝通、分工與展示，把技術轉化成能被理解的成果。
final_scene_table.editing_note: Use team discussion and prototype/demo footage without unverifiable claims.

final_scene_table.caption_text: 學習的過程，也包含提問、討論與彼此支援。
final_scene_table.editing_note: Use learning atmosphere footage and confirm portrait consent.

final_scene_table.caption_text: 歡迎認識國立臺南大學資訊工程學系。
final_scene_table.editing_note: Use ending text card. Use official logo only if permission is confirmed.

final_editing_checklist: Confirm final duration is between 55 and 65 seconds.
Use ChatGPT-generated images only after recording generation dates, output filenames, and usage terms.
Use Suno-generated background music only after recording song title, output filename, and usage terms.
Use Microsoft Clipchamp to assemble images/video, subtitles, narration/music, and export MP4.
Complete asset_sources.md with ChatGPT, Suno, Clipchamp, font, and final output details.
final_asset_source_checklist: ChatGPT image output filenames, generation dates, prompt reference, and usage terms
Suno song title, output filename, generation date, and usage terms
Font source and license or Clipchamp built-in font declaration
Portrait consent if recognizable people appear
github_submission_checklist: Submit the repository homepage URL to Ecourse.
Do not upload API keys, tokens, passwords, cookies or private credentials.
Keep final_video.mp4, report PDF, agents, handoff, traces, outputs and baseline in the repo.
final_video_note: The final MP4 must be edited/exported in Clipchamp and verified manually. ChatGPT image assets and Suno music must be disclosed in asset_sources.md before submission.
agent_notes: Raw Hermes suggestions were filtered to remove unverifiable claims and permission-sensitive items.
This finalizer output is intended as a clean submission checklist and scene table.
